title: First California Coast Drive
subtitle: My first coastal roadtrip during the Verily summer
summary: Ever since, I have been to the California coast in countless times, but the first time is always the most memorizable. I did not even know how to drive back then, it was a friend who organized this short trip and we just drove from San Francisco to Monterey along the coast.

blocks.text: Everything was amazing from a fresh eye. I still remember the crushing waves beneath the Whale cove, the hanging road above the San Gregorio cliffs and the natural bridge on the beach of Santa Cruz. When we arrived Monterey, we visited the famouse Aquarium and the Lovers point.
